## Description
Brief summary of the mathematical or theoretical issue.

## Location in Code
- File(s):
- Function(s)/Module(s):
- Line reference (if applicable):

## Theoretical Background
Describe the correct theory, formula, or model that should be implemented.

### References
- Citation/paper:
- Section/equation:
- URL (if applicable):

## Current Implementation
Describe what the code currently does (include relevant code snippet if short).

```python
# Example code snippet
```

## Expected Behavior
What should the calculation/model produce based on the theory?

## Actual Behavior
What does it currently produce?

## Impact
- [ ] Critical (produces incorrect results)
- [ ] Major (significant deviation from theory)
- [ ] Minor (edge cases or approximation issues)

## Validation/Testing
How can this be verified? (experimental data, analytical solution, etc.)

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information (assumptions, scope of issue, etc.)
